name: Navan Travel & Expense API
what_it_does: Navan (formerly TripActions) API for corporate travel and expense management. Enables programmatic access to travel bookings, expense reports, policy rules, and spend analytics. Used by enterprise companies for automating T&E workflows and reporting.
use_cases: Querying employee travel bookings and itineraries from travel management agents
Retrieving expense reports and reimbursement status from finance automation agents
Monitoring travel policy compliance from governance agents
Generating T&E spend analytics and reports from financial reporting agents
best_when: An enterprise with Navan wants AI agents to query travel and expense data, monitor policy compliance, and generate T&E reports — reducing manual finance operations.
avoid_when: You need to book travel autonomously without approval workflows. FINANCIAL RISK: Corporate T&E data includes sensitive business travel information.

auth.notes: Navan API uses OAuth 2.0 for user-level access and API keys for service integrations. Contact Navan for developer access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Navan requires enterprise contract; API access included
pricing.notes: Enterprise T&E platform with negotiated pricing. API access typically included with enterprise subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits not publicly documented; contact Navan for API limits

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Corporate travel and expense data — sensitive business information
No public MCP server — agents must use REST API directly
Travel booking requires employee approval workflows — do not bypass
API access requires enterprise contract and Navan approval
Previously TripActions — documentation may reference both names
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Corporate T&E data. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. OAuth required. Travel booking workflows require human approval. Enterprise access only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate T&E data including travel itineraries and expense data. SOC2 and GDPR. Employee PII in travel records.
